title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・横切った声

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
OH YEAAAAAH! I won the Queen Elizabeth II
Cup! I'm the princess, the queen, the royal
supreme!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? This should be a day of joy, but so much
of the audience looks unhappy. They're saying... a
hooligan isn't fit to be queen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The more I listen, the more I hear disapproving
voices from every direction. Were people really
hurt because of my wild behavior?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It even turns out that what Trainer was hiding
from me before wasn't a present at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess Trainer was trying to keep me from seeing
all these negative letters... Am I a princess that
nobody wants?
